seoTitle: The Narrows vs Ti Tree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between The Narrows and Ti Tree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: The Narrows vs Ti Tree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in The Narrows and Ti Tree.
heading: The Narrows vs Ti Tree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between The Narrows, Northern Territory and Ti Tree, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ti Tree has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to The Narrows (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is The Narrows or Ti Tree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: The Narrows has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Ti Tree scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: The Narrows scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Ti Tree scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in The Narrows or Ti Tree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ti Tree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
